name: Pool Volume Calculator
seo_description: Calculate the litres and m³ of your swimming pool, initial chlorine dose and weekly maintenance product. Free, no signup.
example_label: Calculate volume of 8m x 4m x 1.5m pool.
result_context: The result main es {volumen_m3} m³. Este value sirve as referencia to tu project.
mistakes: No Consider perdidas of carga in tuberias
Dimensionar without margin of flow rate simultaneo
Olvidar pressure minima requerida in grifos
desc: Calculate the water volume and maintenance chemicals for your pool.
